title: ABGH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi (ABGH Delhi)
short_info: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi (ABGH Delhi) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 5 Junior Resident Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the ABGH Delhi office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 30 years for General, 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for General candidates. Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST candidates, 33 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from a recognized university and must have completed internship on or before 02.06.2026.
qualification.details: MBBS Degree from a recognized university Completed internship on or before 02.06.2026 Valid DMC Registration Certificate Candidate has not completed one year of Junior Residency in any recognized institution including regular & Adhoc period. Candidates, who have completed internship earlier than two years on 02.06.2026, shall not be eligible.

salary_details.details: Pay level 10 (Rs.56100-177500) plus allowances as admissible under rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Junior Resident posts at ABGH Delhi?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Junior Resident posts at Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi is scheduled for 02 June 2026. Candidates should report with all necessary documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Junior Resident position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Junior Resident position, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized university and have completed their internship on or before 02 June 2026. A valid DMC Registration Certificate is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for General category candidates is 30 years. For SC/ST candidates, the maximum age limit is 35 years, and for OBC candidates, it is 33 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The Junior Resident position is offered at Pay Level 10, with a salary ranging from Rs. 56,100 to Rs. 1,77,500 per month, plus applicable allowances as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Junior Resident post at Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident posts involves a Written Exam (MCQ Based) followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the 3rd floor, Conference Hall, ABGH, Moti Nagar, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring a duly filled Performa, a set of self-attested copies of all certificates, Marksheets, Original ID, and two recent passport-size photographs. Original certificates are also required for verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the reporting time for the interview?
faq.answer: The interview reporting time is between 09:00 am to 09:45 am on the day of the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any experience required for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates should not have completed one year of Junior Residency in any recognized institution. Also, those who completed their internship more than two years prior to 02 June 2026 are not eligible.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Junior Resident posts at ABGH Delhi?
